title: Learning Curriculum
description: Personalized learning path with chapters, topics, estimated times, and assessment markers.

generatedFor.description: Name of the learner this curriculum was generated for

generatedAt.description: ISO8601 timestamp when the curriculum was created

lastUpdated.description: ISO8601 timestamp when the curriculum was last modified

estimatedTotalHours.description: Estimated total hours to complete the curriculum

chapters.description: Ordered list of chapters in the curriculum

description.description: Brief summary of what the chapter covers

estimatedHours.description: Estimated hours to complete this chapter

topics.description: Ordered list of topics within this chapter

chapterQuiz.description: Whether this chapter has a comprehensive quiz at the end

chapterAssignment.description: Whether this chapter has a hands-on assignment

description.description: Brief summary of what the topic covers

estimatedMinutes.description: Estimated minutes to complete this topic

hasQuiz.description: Whether this topic has a knowledge check quiz

hasAssignment.description: Whether this topic has a hands-on assignment

status.description: Current status of this topic for the learner

note.description: Additional context about the topic status
